allow: Bash(powershell -Command "$WshShell = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell; $Shortcut = $WshShell.CreateShortcut\(""$env:APPDATA\\Microsoft\\Windows\\Start Menu\\Programs\\Startup\\RPA Tray.lnk""\); $Shortcut.TargetPath = ''C:\\Users\\PC\\Dropbox\\Nhu Tien\\kiotviet-payment-automation\\run_tray.bat''; $Shortcut.WorkingDirectory = ''C:\\Users\\PC\\Dropbox\\Nhu Tien\\kiotviet-payment-automation''; $Shortcut.WindowStyle = 7; $Shortcut.Save\(\); Write-Host ''Shortcut created''")

Bash(powershell -File - <<'PS1'
$WshShell = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell
